title: Concrete
body:
# Concrete for Beta 1.7.3

## Adds Concrete Powder, and Concrete with all the colors!

Concrete is just a small mod I made that adds Concrete from r1.12. Please note that Client version 1.2 works just fine with Server version 1.1. In the event that you are experiencing any issues with Client version 1.1, please update to Client version 1.2 and see if those issues still exist before notifying me.

 **Client Version 1.2**: This fixes all the bugs listed above, also fixes how concrete powder interacts with water on the client. This is still compatible with Server Version 1.1 so don't worry about that.

Client is required to play with the Multiplayer version but the Multiplayer version is not required to play Singleplayer. I don't want any sort of confusion.

**Requirements for Client are Risugami's Modloader, and ModloaderMP by ScottyDoesKnow and Jamioflan AKA the people who made the SDK mods back then.**

[ModLoader Official Indirect Download](http://www.mediafire.com/file/vb5bq3aoitdkgx8/ModLoader+B1.7.3.zip)

[ModLoaderMP Official Direct Download](http://www.mediafire.com/file/j60zj1ljdtv03g7/ModLoaderMp+1.7.3+Unofficial+v2.zip)

**Requirements for Server are ModloaderMP(Server-Side) by ScottyDoesKnow and Jamioflan**

[ModLoaderMP Official Direct Download](http://www.mediafire.com/file/ivb74fttuebrj7k/ModLoaderMp+1.7.3+Unofficial+Server+v2.zip)


If you are interested in Beta and Alpha modders alike try joining the discord, or if you'd like to get involved yourself!

If you are wondering where I got the ModLoader links, I got them through MCArchive.net
